# GetDeviceAddress

**Instance Method**

Retrieves the address of the device.

## Declaration

```swift
kern_return_t GetDeviceAddress(uint8_t * address) const;
```

## Parameters

- **address**: A pointer to a variable. On output, the variable contains the device’s address.

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/DriverKit/kIOReturnSuccess] on success, or another value if an error occurs. See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/DriverKit/error-codes].

## Getting the Device Attributes

- **GetSpeed**: Retrieves the device’s operational speed.
- **tIOUSBHostConnectionSpeed**: Constants indicating the connection speed of the device.
